perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink short-sleeved top and a cartoon rabbit ear filter, is sitting in the driver's seat of a stationary car, speaking directly into the camera. (2) Various Chinese text overlays appear in the center of the frame; a small cartoon sticker of a person vomiting appears on the left; an inset image of a hand covered in a white, thick, viscous liquid is briefly shown to illustrate her story. (3) She continues talking with expressive facial movements, showing a mix of surprise and mild disgust, while gesturing slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Mandarin begins immediately, accompanied by upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music. (2) As the speaker's tone remains expressive and narrative, occasional sharp 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects trigger alongside the appearance of text and stickers. (3) The music and speech maintain a consistent volume and pace throughout the duration of the clip until a sharp cut at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Hook: '剛才好危險喔!!' (It was so dangerous just now!!) with a sense of urgency. (2) Narrative Description: '一輛車在我面前突然停下來' (A car suddenly stopped in front of me) and '然後有一個女生跑了下來在路旁吐' (Then a girl ran down and vomited by the roadside). (3) Descriptive Emphasis: '吐出那個... 黏黏... 白色 稠狀物' (Spitting out that... sticky... white thick substance) with a tone of disgust. (4) Humorous Hook: '天哪 他男朋友開車技術也太差了吧' (Oh my god, her boyfriend's driving skills are way too poor) conveying a playful, judgmental tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Constant talking head format with dynamic text and image overlays.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible in the driver's seat.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, slightly wavy dark hair, wearing a bright pink scoop-neck t-shirt and a digital rabbit ear filter.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a vehicle showing the steering wheel, headrest, and car roof; trees and bright daylight are visible through the window.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight coming from the side window.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is intended to entertain the audience by sharing a humorous, slightly shocking, and relatable real-life anecdote. The creator uses expressive storytelling, variety-show style text overlays, and a vivid (though possibly misleading) visual aid to recount an experience of seeing someone get car sick, ultimately using it as a punchline about poor driving skills.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of rabbit ear filters combined with storytelling
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a typical short-form content format common on platforms like Douyin, where creators share 'tea' or anecdotes from their daily life to build engagement.
